content.en:
The Taiwu Sword Sect is at war with the Chilin Clan, and there are a lot of fourth realms that are secretly snooping, but they are all watching and not participating.

But.

When Ye Tian was secretly spying, he also discovered other Fourth Realms.

this day.

The Taiwu Sword Sect invaded the Chilin Clan again, and the main forces of both sides were dispatched, a large number of Fourth Realms were fighting, and a large number of Third Realms and even the Second Realm were being slaughtered everywhere, and this area had become a battlefield.

And many of the formations of the Chilin clan have been shattered, and this time there is a high probability that the ancestral land will be completely broken.

Then.

Ye Tian infiltrated here, killed some of the Chilin Clan, and entered the interior of the Chilin Clan.

The Chilin Clan must still have some ten-dimensional treasure liquid in stock, if he doesn't have one, he can also absorb a little ten-dimensional treasure liquid and leave.

This is a good opportunity, if you miss this opportunity, it will be difficult to obtain the Ten Dimensional Treasure Liquid again.

After entering the Chilin Clan's land, Ye Tiancai found that the dimensions of the Chilin Clan's land were actually separated layer by layer.

Separated from the layers of dimensions, Ye Tian could also do it, but he couldn't maintain it for long.

And looking at the Chilin clan like this, it is obvious that it can maintain the appearance of dimensional separation for a long time.

The first layer of dimensional space!

The second dimension of space!19

The third dimension of space!

Each layer of the Red Lin Clan's dimensional space is very large, enough to house many extradimensional creatures of the Red Lin Clan.

"There is also a fourth dimension, which should be the most important place for the Chilin Clan!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Swish!

He immediately rushed into the fourth dimension of the Chilin Clan, and after entering the fourth dimension, he saw a very majestic branch of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, although the other layers of dimensions also had the small branches of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, but it was only a few of the countless small branches, but this one was one of the important main branches.

Ye Tian guessed that the reason why the four-layer dimension of the Chilin Clan could be maintained all the time was because the power of this ten-dimensional treasure tree was maintained, otherwise, the Chilin Clan would not be able to do so at all.

"The power of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree is really terrifying, but it's a pity that the Chilin Clan can't use the power of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree to attack, otherwise if you exert a little bit of attack, I'm afraid that even the Fifth Realm won't be able to break through the Chilin Clan. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Like the superdimensional elves, they made perfect use of the wood of the mother of fog, which made those who did not dare to enter the territory of the superdimensional elves in the fourth realm, but this is also the fact that the superdimensional elves themselves were born on the wood of the mother of fog.

However, the Chilin clan was not born in the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, they just discovered the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree and occupied this place.

Soon.

Ye Tian had discovered the treasure house of the Chilin Clan in the fourth dimension, and he wanted to snatch this treasure house.

Suddenly.

A formation was shattered, and from the shattered formation, a huge Chilin clan emerged, the other party's aura was very terrifying, but it was as if he was going to die, exuding the aura of death and decay.

"The Fourth Realm, and the most terrifying Fourth Realm!

Ye Tian was a little more dignified, this Fourth Realm was stronger than any Fourth Realm he had seen in the past, and the extra-dimensional rules emanating from the other party's body had reached more than 10,000 Dao, and he had cultivated an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and this innate multi-dimensional Dao body had reached the realm of the second layer of Dacheng.

Of course, the other party's cultivation had also reached the limit of the fourth realm.

Such a fourth realm can't be found in the 5,000th Territory at all, but there is one extradimensional creature race like the Chilin Clan, which is not too powerful.

However, this Fourth Realm seems to have suffered some kind of fatal injury, and he can't live long, and he has been using the formation to seal himself to save his life before.

But now, Ye Tian has invaded here, and this Fourth Realm is no longer asleep, and immediately wakes up to resist Ye Tian.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sand and Gravel Tribulation, and combined with the power of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, the attack power had reached an incredible level.

However.

This Fourth Realm actually absorbed the power of a ten-dimensional treasure tree and turned it into a shield.

Ye Tian's gravel robbery light hit the opponent's body, and it was directly blocked by that shield, and did not break through its defense.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

His two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies were superimposed together, which was definitely comparable to the innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies of the third layer, and they were also the innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies that were not weak in the third layer.

And he also performed the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Technique, which is far beyond the top super-dimensional supernatural attack and killing methods!

It stands to reason that only a very small number of the Fourth Realm can block such an attack, and it definitely does not include this Fourth Realm who is injured and about to die.

However, this Fourth Realm of the Chilin Clan was even more shocked.

"Four realms and multi-dimensional mastery, two innate multi-dimensional Taoist !!!"

The fourth realm of the Chilin clan was very dignified, and he was extremely jealous of Ye Tian.

He knew very well that Ye Tian was at a low level of extra-dimensional rules, and there were only a few hundred extra-dimensional rules, if he comprehended thousands of extra-dimensional rules, the blow just now would definitely break his defense and kill him.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian attacked again and again, and every time he used the sand and gravel robbery, he did not break the opponent's defense.

"No, you can't break through the opponent's defense, even if you cast the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Wumu Sword Light, it is estimated that you won't be able to kill the opponent. "

But.

He's still ready to give it a try.

"Wumu Sword Light, kill!"

Ye Tian went all out, urged the will of the eighth dimension, and unleashed the sword light of the black mother.

As soon as the sword light of Wumu came out, the face of the 230 Chilin clan in the fourth realm changed drastically.

But.

The black mother's sword light hit the wisp of the ten-dimensional treasure tree shield, but it still didn't break the defense, only a wisp of power penetrated into the soul will of this fourth realm, and it didn't hurt the other party.

"Sure enough, if you can't break the defense, it is impossible for the black mother sword light to kill the other party!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

That's when it happened.

A voice emerged.

"This friend, are you interested in cooperating, you and I will join forces to attack and kill the White Bone Realm Lord of the Chilin Clan, and after snatching this treasure house, how about dividing up the harvest?"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian was shocked, because he didn't even perceive the existence of the other party, and he didn't detect the other party by copying his talent.

Obviously, the other party's concealment methods were not detected by the Replication Genius.

"Do you have a way to break through the opponent's defenses?"

Ye Tian asked softly.

"Naturally!" the voice added, "I can strike a blow and break through the ten-dimensional shield of the Chilin Clan, and then my friend, you will use the Eighth Dimensional Will to slash the White Bone Realm Lord." "

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

Wow!

The fifth dimension void rippled, and a young man in a cyan treasure robe appeared, and then held a long knife in his hand, and cast the blessing of the multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms, the extremely terrifying super-dimensional rules, and slashed at the white bone realm master.
